text: "Hello?" "Hello?" "Good morning. My name is Jacob. So, I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Washington State Relief Program. So, have you been notified about these benefits yet? "Yeah, and we actually sent you a notification about the pending credits on your Medicare account. I just want to help you get these benefits processed. You're on both part A and part B, right?"
